{{Quote|I'm counting on you.|[[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]] to Zenfrei|<ref name="Evasive Action: End Game">''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]''</ref>}}
'''Zenfrei''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] living during the era of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He served as an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]], and assisted his recovery after [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] burned out Tagge's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

{{Char-stub}}
